statement: A Stage 2 scheduler or partition strategy is promotable only if observable results are invariant between the unpartitioned baseline execution and the Stage 2 execution for every promoted profile.
observable_result_surface: reject codes and reject trace correlation identifiers
dependency consequence facts visible to later recalculation
overlay retention/release observations visible to pinned readers
format_delta and display_delta consequences when exercised by the promoted profile
runtime effect surfaces visible to TraceCalc or pack replay
deterministic replay bundle manifests and validation status
semantic_equivalence_statement: This criteria packet changes no scheduler policy. It defines the observable-result invariance obligations that any future scheduler or partition strategy change must satisfy before promotion.
